title: Starport visa
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Starport_visa.jpg|thumb|right|Iziz starport visa]]
A '''starport visa''' was a specific type of documentation that allowed a traveler to freely enter or leave a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] on a given planet. There were two types of starport visas: open, which anyone could use, or personalized, which could only be used by a particular individual. During the [[Onderon Civil War]], government officials had ceased issuing starport visas, making them supremely valuable. Traveling to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] in the company of [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore]] with the intention of contacting [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kavar]], the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] was given a personalized visa upon her arrival to the [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] [[Iziz Starport|starport]]. While in Iziz, the Exile was approached by many people looking for a starport visa. Each of these individuals had what seemed to be compelling reasons for needing to leave the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

During her time in Iziz, the Exile came into the possession of two extra starport visas, one open and one personalized. In the [[Unidentified Iziz cantina|Iziz Cantina]], there was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] by the name of [[Kiph]] who had the ability to slice a personalized visa into an open visa; the Exile took advantage of his services to modify the personalized visa. She was then able to give away the two visas to the individuals of her choice.

==Behind the scenes==
In the game, ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the player character has a choice of 5 individuals that they can give the visas to: [[Gormo]], a stranded [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] captain; [[Xaart]], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] spy; [[Sakarie]], an [[Exchange]] operative; [[Tolas]], a greedy merchant and [[Terlyn]], a desperate mother of two children. The player will gain [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] or [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] points and there is opportunity to gain influence with different companions depending on the player's choices.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
